events.content: PASS: The deliverable provides a complete and detailed CSV dataset of high-value prospect segments for an AI-driven FAQ Receptionist product, along with a comprehensive data dictionary and methodology for generating the illustrative AI-FAQ spend figures.

PASS: The deliverable provides a complete markdown playbook with the top 10 objections, concise core answers, rebuttal points, illustrative proof, usage guidance, impact metrics, and maintenance plan, fully satisfying the ticket requirements.

PASS: The deliverable provides a comprehensive and detailed checklist covering all aspects of data security for FAQ Receptionist deployments, including data handling, encryption, access controls, GDPR/CCPA considerations, client-side security, and pre-deployment verification steps.
